OmniIntegrationProcedure.customJavaScript: { "Err_ProcessType": "IP", "Err_CtxId": "0017x00001GkcjhAAB", "Err_RunningContext": "ClinicianContractRequestOS", "lstclinicianandHPF": [ { "hpfStatus": "Prospect", "effectiveDate": null, "contractingStatus": null, "Id": "0bS7x0000003DVNEA2", "checked": true, "facilityTitle": "EE Nurse Practitioner", "accountName": "BPC Hospital", "facilityId": "0hs7x0000007K8iAAE", "Contracting_Corporate_Entity__c": "0017x00001Igg8RAAR", "accountId": "0017x000019oDCUAA2" } ], "requestType": "", "ContextId": "0017x00001GkcjhAAB", "employeeType": "Employee", "existingDraftContract": "8007x00000dxgsnAAA", "activeContractId": "8007x00000dtwL3AAI", "contractStartDate": "2025-08-01", "contractEndDate": "", "isNPPA": false, "omniScriptId": "0jN7x0000004MJhEAM", "elementName": "IP_CreateContractAndPNC" }
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: CreateContractAndPNC

childElements.name: DM_CreateContractRec
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "RecordTypeId" : "%SV_SetContractField:clinicianContractRecordTypeId%", "Status" : "%SV_SetContractField:Status%", "ContextId" : "%ContextId%", "Clinician" : "%DRE_GetClinicianDeatils:clinicianAccountDetails:PersonContactId%", "employeeType" : "%employeeType%", "activeContractId" : "=IF(%swapEEAndICDates% == \"true\",%activeContractId%,'')", "contractStartDate" : "=FORMATDATETIMEGMT(%contractStartDate%, \"yyyy-MM-dd\")", "contractEndDate" : "=FORMATDATETIMEGMT(%contractEndDate%, \"yyyy-MM-dd\")", "isNPPA" : "%isNPPA%", "contractCorporatingEntity" : "=IF(LISTSIZE(%SV_SetContractField:checkCorporateEntityList%) == LISTSIZE(%lstclinicianandHPF%),%lstclinicianandHPF|1:Contracting_Corporate_Entity__c%,'')", "adminCheckBox" : "%adminCheckBox%", "AdministrativeStartDate" : "%AdministrativeStartDate%", "timeType" : "%timeType%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DMCreateContract", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction3", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: IP_CreatePNCRecords
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "hpfList" : "%lstclinicianandHPF%", "Status" : "%SV_SetContractField:Status%", "ContractId" : "%DM_CreateContractRec:Contract_1:Id%", "ContextId" : "%ContextId%", "contractStartDate" : "%contractStartDate%", "contractEndDate" : "%contractEndDate%", "isNPPA" : "%isNPPA%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "integrationProcedureKey" : "Clinician_CreatePNCRecords", "remoteOptions" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "disableChainable" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "IntegrationProcedureAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DA_DeleteContractAndRelated
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "deleteSObject" : [ { "Type" : "Contract", "Id" : "%existingDraftContract%", "AllOrNone" : false } ], "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "allOrNone" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DeleteAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SV_SetContractField
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "clinicianContractRecordTypeId" : "=QUERY(\"SELECT Id FROM Recordtype WHERE SobjectType = 'contract' and DeveloperName ='Clinician'\")", "Status" : "Draft", "checkCorporateEntityList" : "=LIST(FILTER(LIST(%lstclinicianandHPF%), 'Contracting_Corporate_Entity__c == \"' + %lstclinicianandHPF|1:Contracting_Corporate_Entity__c% + '\"'))" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues2", "disOnTplt" : false }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "linkToExternalObject" : "", "trackingCustomData" : { }, "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "labelSingular" : "", "labelPlural" : "", "description" : "", "nameColumn" : "", "rollbackOnError" : false, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "ttlMinutes" : 5, "mockResponseMap" : { } }
